title: Connectors: Because of, Although, In Order to
description: Los conectores de causa, contraste y propósito son el pegamento de los textos B1. 'Although she was tired, she continued.' 'Due to the rain, the match was cancelled.'

items.front: She stayed home because she was feeling ill. / The flight was cancelled due to bad weather.
items.back: Se quedó en casa porque se sentía mal. / El vuelo fue cancelado debido al mal tiempo.
items.explanation: CAUSE connectors: BECAUSE + cláusula (sujeto + verbo). BECAUSE OF / DUE TO + sustantivo/frase nominal. 'Because it rained' (correcto) vs 'Because of the rain' (correcto). ERROR: 'Because of it rained' — NO se puede usar before a full clause.

cardRef.front: Connectors of Cause (because / since / as / due to / because of + noun)

items.front: Although she was tired, she continued working. / The test was difficult. However, most students passed.
items.back: Aunque estaba cansada, siguió trabajando. / El examen fue difícil. Sin embargo, la mayoría aprobó.
items.explanation: CONTRAST connectors: ALTHOUGH / EVEN THOUGH + cláusula (más fuerte que although). HOWEVER = adverbio, entre dos oraciones con punto o punto y coma. DESPITE / IN SPITE OF + sustantivo o gerundio (-ing). Regla importante: HOWEVER nunca une dos cláusulas dentro de la misma oración.

items.front: I woke up early to catch the first train. / She studied hard so that she could get a scholarship.
items.back: Me levanté temprano para tomar el primer tren. / Estudió mucho para que pudiera conseguir una beca.
items.explanation: PURPOSE connectors: TO / IN ORDER TO + infinitivo (mismo sujeto). SO THAT + cláusula (puede tener diferente sujeto). 'I left early so that SHE could sleep' (yo me fui para que ELLA pudiera dormir — diferentes sujetos). SO AS NOT TO = para no + infinitivo.

steps.title: Conectores de causa: because vs because of
steps.instruction: BECAUSE + cláusula completa. BECAUSE OF / DUE TO + sustantivo. Es el error más común: 'Because of it rained' — INCORRECTO. 'Because it rained' o 'because of the rain' — CORRECTO.

steps.title: Contraste y propósito: although, however, so that
steps.instruction: ALTHOUGH/EVEN THOUGH + cláusula. HOWEVER entre oraciones (con punto). DESPITE + sustantivo/-ing. Para propósito: TO/IN ORDER TO (mismo sujeto) vs SO THAT (puede ser diferente sujeto).

steps.title: ¿Qué conector usar?
steps.instruction: Elegí el conector correcto según el contexto y la estructura gramatical.

steps.title: Completá con el conector correcto
steps.instruction: Elegí el conector apropiado para cada espacio.

exercises.template: The concert was cancelled {0} the bad weather.
{0} she was scared, she jumped into the water.
He left his phone at home. {0}, he didn't miss any important calls.
I turned off the TV {0} the baby could sleep.
{0} being very tired, she finished the report.

steps.title: ¿Error o correcta?
steps.instruction: Identificá errores en el uso de conectores.

exercises.sentence: She failed the exam because of she didn't study.
exercises.correction: She failed the exam because she didn't study.
exercises.explanation: INCORRECTO. 'Because of' va seguido de SUSTANTIVO o frase nominal (because of the noise, because of her illness). Cuando sigue una cláusula completa (sujeto + verbo), se usa 'because' solo.

exercises.sentence: The match was cancelled because of heavy rain.
exercises.explanation: Correcto. 'Because of' + sustantivo/frase nominal (heavy rain). La estructura es perfecta.

exercises.sentence: The price was high, however we decided to buy it.
exercises.correction: The price was high. However, we decided to buy it.
exercises.explanation: INCORRECTO. 'However' como conector entre dos oraciones necesita separación con PUNTO (o punto y coma). No puede unir dos cláusulas con solo una coma. Correcto: 'The price was high. However, we decided to buy it.'

exercises.sentence: I'm saving money in order to travel next summer.
exercises.explanation: Correcto. 'In order to' + infinitivo para expresar propósito. Más formal que 'to' solo, pero perfectamente correcto.

steps.title: ¡Lección completa!
steps.instruction: Conectores B1: CAUSA: because + cláusula / because of + sustantivo / due to + sustantivo. CONTRASTE: although + cláusula / however (entre oraciones con punto) / despite + sustantivo o -ing. PROPÓSITO: to/in order to + infinitivo (mismo sujeto) / so that + cláusula (puede ser diferente sujeto). Error clave: 'because of it rained' — NUNCA. 'However,' entre comas al inicio de oración nueva — SIEMPRE.
